availableCommands.name: debug
availableCommands.description: Enable debug logging for this session and help diagnose issues (bundled)

availableCommands.name: simplify
availableCommands.description: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found. (bundled)

availableCommands.name: batch
availableCommands.description: Research and plan a large-scale change, then execute it in parallel across 5–30 isolated worktree agents that each open a PR. (bundled)

availableCommands.name: loop
availableCommands.description: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo, defaults to 10m) (bundled)

availableCommands.name: claude-api
availableCommands.description:
Build apps with the Claude API or Anthropic SDK.
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`/`claude_agent_sdk`, or user asks to use Claude API, Anthropic SDKs, or Agent SDK.
DO NOT TRIGGER when: code imports `openai`/other AI SDK, general programming, or ML/data-science tasks. (bundled)

availableCommands.name: gsd:plan-phase
availableCommands.description: Create detailed phase plan (PLAN.md) with verification loop (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:add-todo
availableCommands.description: Capture idea or task as todo from current conversation context (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:insert-phase
availableCommands.description: Insert urgent work as decimal phase (e.g., 72.1) between existing phases (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:join-discord
availableCommands.description: Join the GSD Discord community (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:verify-work
availableCommands.description: Validate built features through conversational UAT (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:debug
availableCommands.description: Systematic debugging with persistent state across context resets (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:update
availableCommands.description: Update GSD to latest version with changelog display (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:help
availableCommands.description: Show available GSD commands and usage guide (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:progress
availableCommands.description: Check project progress, show context, and route to next action (execute or plan) (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:resume-work
availableCommands.description: Resume work from previous session with full context restoration (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:execute-phase
availableCommands.description: Execute all plans in a phase with wave-based parallelization (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:new-project
availableCommands.description: Initialize a new project with deep context gathering and PROJECT.md (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:set-profile
availableCommands.description: Switch model profile for GSD agents (quality/balanced/budget) (user)

    15→  ipcMain.handle('workspace:getCategoryMetaPath', (_, categoryName: string) => {
    16→    const basePath = getMetaProjectsPath()
    17→    // Sanitize category name for filesystem
    18→    const safeName = categoryName.replace(/[/\\:*?"<>|]/g, '_')
    19→    return join(basePath, safeName)
    20→  })
    21→  ipcMain.handle('workspace:addProject', async () => {
    22→    const mainWindow = getMainWindow()
    23→    const result = await dialog.showOpenDialog(mainWindow!, {
    24→      properties: ['openDirectory'],
    25→      title: 'Select Project Folder'
    26→    })
    27→    return result.canceled ? null : result.filePaths[0] || null
    28→  })
    29→
    30→  ipcMain.handle('workspace:addProjectsFromParent', async () => {
    31→    const mainWindow = getMainWindow()
    32→    const result = await dialog.showOpenDialog(mainWindow!, {
    33→      properties: ['openDirectory'],
    34→      title: 'Select Parent Folder (all subdirectories will be added as projects)'
    35→    })
    36→    if (result.canceled || !result.filePaths[0]) return null
    37→
    38→    const parentDir = result.filePaths[0]
    39→
    40→    try {
    41→      const entries = readdirSync(parentDir, { withFileTypes: true })
    42→      const subdirs = entries
    43→        .filter((entry) => entry.isDirectory() && !entry.name.startsWith('.'))
    44→        .map((entry) => ({
    45→          path: join(parentDir, entry.name),
    46→          name: entry.name
    47→        }))
    48→      return subdirs
    49→    } catch (e) {
    50→      console.error('Failed to scan parent directory:', e)
    51→      return null
    52→    }
    53→  })
    54→
    55→  // Session discovery
    56→  ipcMain.handle('sessions:discover', (_, projectPath: string, backend?: 'claude' | 'gemini' | 'codex' | 'opencode' | 'aider') => discoverSessions(projectPath, backend))
    57→}
    58→

     1→import { BrowserWindow, dialog, ipcMain } from 'electron'
     2→import { join } from 'path'
     3→import { readdirSync, statSync } from 'fs'
     4→import { SessionStore } from '../../session-store.js'
     5→import { getMetaProjectsPath } from '../../meta-project-sync.js'
     6→import { discoverSessions } from '../../session-discovery.js'
     7→
     8→export function registerWorkspaceHandlers(
     9→  sessionStore: SessionStore,
    10→  getMainWindow: () => BrowserWindow | null
    11→): void {
    12→  ipcMain.handle('workspace:get', () => sessionStore.getWorkspace())
    13→  ipcMain.handle('workspace:save', (_, workspace) => sessionStore.saveWorkspace(workspace))
    14→  ipcMain.handle('workspace:getMetaProjectsPath', () => getMetaProjectsPath())
    15→  ipcMain.handle('workspace:getCategoryMetaPath', (_, categoryName: string) => {
    16→    const basePath = getMetaProjectsPath()
    17→    // Sanitize category name for filesystem
    18→    const safeName = categoryName.replace(/[/\\:*?"<>|]/g, '_')
    19→    return join(basePath, safeName)
    20→  })
    21→  ipcMain.handle('workspace:addProject', async () => {
    22→    const mainWindow = getMainWindow()
    23→    const result = await dialog.showOpenDialog(mainWindow!, {
    24→      properties: ['openDirectory'],
    25→      title: 'Select Project Folder'
    26→    })
    27→    return result.canceled ? null : result.filePaths[0] || null
    28→  })
    29→
    30→  ipcMain.handle('workspace:addProjectsFromParent', async () => {
    31→    const mainWindow = getMainWindow()
    32→    const result = await dialog.showOpenDialog(mainWindow!, {
    33→      properties: ['openDirectory'],
    34→      title: 'Select Parent Folder (all subdirectories will be added as projects)'
    35→    })
    36→    if (result.canceled || !result.filePaths[0]) return null
    37→
    38→    const parentDir = result.filePaths[0]
    39→
    40→    try {
    41→      const entries = readdirSync(parentDir, { withFileTypes: true })
    42→      const subdirs = entries
    43→        .filter((entry) => entry.isDirectory() && !entry.name.startsWith('.'))
    44→        .map((entry) => ({
    45→          path: join(parentDir, entry.name),
    46→          name: entry.name
    47→        }))
    48→      return subdirs
    49→    } catch (e) {
    50→      console.error('Failed to scan parent directory:', e)
    51→      return null
    52→    }
    53→  })
    54→
    55→  // Session discovery
    56→  ipcMain.handle('sessions:discover', (_, projectPath: string, backend?: 'claude' | 'gemini' | 'codex' | 'opencode' | 'aider') => discoverSessions(projectPath, backend))
    57→}

     1→import { app } from 'electron'
     2→import { existsSync, mkdirSync, readFileSync, writeFileSync, renameSync, statSync } from 'fs'
     3→import { join } from 'path'
     4→import { syncMetaProjects } from './meta-project-sync'
     5→
     6→export interface ProjectCategory {
     7→  id: string
     8→  name: string
     9→  collapsed: boolean
    10→  order: number
    11→}
    12→
    13→export interface Project {
    14→  path: string
    15→  name: string
    16→  executable?: string
    17→  apiPort?: number  // Port for HTTP API to send prompts to terminal
    18→  apiAutoStart?: boolean  // Whether to auto-start API when session opens (default: false)
    19→  apiSessionMode?: 'existing' | 'new-keep' | 'new-close'  // How API requests handle sessions
    20→  apiModel?: 'default' | 'opus' | 'sonnet' | 'haiku'  // Model for API-triggered sessions
    21→  autoAcceptTools?: string[]  // Per-project tool patterns to auto-accept
    22→  permissionMode?: string     // Per-project permission mode
    23→  color?: string              // Project color for visual identification
    24→  ttsVoice?: string           // Per-project TTS voice (overrides global)
    25→  ttsEngine?: 'piper' | 'xtts'  // Per-project TTS engine
    26→  backend?: 'default' | 'claude' | 'gemini' | 'codex' | 'opencode' | 'aider' // Per-project backend (overrides global)
    27→  categoryId?: string         // Category this project belongs to
    28→  order?: number              // Order within category or uncategorized list
    29→}
    30→
    31→export interface OpenTab {
    32→  id: string
    33→  projectPath: string
    34→  sessionId?: string
    35→  title: string
    36→  ptyId?: string
    37→  backend?: 'default' | 'claude' | 'gemini' | 'codex' | 'opencode' | 'aider'
    38→}
    39→
    40→export interface TileLayout {
    41→  id: string
    42→  tabIds: string[]
    43→  activeTabId: string
    44→  x: number
    45→  y: number
    46→  width: number
    47→  height: number
    48→}
    49→
    50→export interface Workspace {
    51→  projects: Project[]
    52→  openTabs: OpenTab[]
    53→  activeTabId: string | null
    54→  viewMode?: 'tabs' | 'tiled'
    55→  tileLayout?: TileLayout[]
    56→  categories?: ProjectCategory[]
    57→}
    58→
    59→export interface WindowBounds {
    60→  x: number
    61→  y: number
    62→  width: number
    63→  height: number
    64→}
    65→
    66→export interface ThemeCustomization {
    67→  accentColor: string | null
    68→  backgroundColor: string | null
    69→  textColor: string | null
    70→  terminalColors: {
    71→    black?: string
    72→    red?: string
    73→    green?: string
    74→    yellow?: string
    75→    blue?: string
    76→    magenta?: string
    77→    cyan?: string
    78→    white?: string
    79→  } | null
    80→}
    81→
    82→export interface Settings {
    83→  defaultProjectDir: string
    84→  theme: string
    85→  themeCustomization?: ThemeCustomization | null
    86→  voiceOutputEnabled?: boolean
    87→  voiceVolume?: number
    88→  voiceSpeed?: number
    89→  voiceSkipOnNew?: boolean
    90→  voiceSilenceThreshold?: number
    91→  autoAcceptTools?: string[]
    92→  permissionMode?: string
    93→  backend?: 'default' | 'claude' | 'gemini' | 'codex' | 'opencode' | 'aider'
    94→}
    95→
    96→
    97→interface StoredData {
    98→  workspace: Workspace
    99→  windowBounds?: WindowBounds
   100→  settings?: Settings
   101→}
   102→
   103→export class SessionStore {
   104→  private configPath: string
   105→  private backupPath: string
   106→  private data: StoredData
   107→
   108→  constructor() {
   109→    const configDir = join(app.getPath('userData'), 'config')
   110→    if (!existsSync(configDir)) {
   111→      mkdirSync(configDir, { recursive: true })
   112→    }
   113→    this.configPath = join(configDir, 'workspace.json')
   114→    this.backupPath = join(configDir, 'workspace.json.backup')
   115→    this.data = this.load()
   116→  }
   117→
   118→  private loadFile(path: string): StoredData | null {
   119→    try {
   120→      if (!existsSync(path)) return null
   121→      const stat = statSync(path)
   122→      if (stat.size === 0) return null
   123→      const content = readFileSync(path, 'utf-8')
   124→      const data = JSON.parse(content)
   125→      if (!data?.workspace) return null
   126→      return data
   127→    } catch (e) {
   128→      console.error(`[SessionStore] Failed to load ${path}:`, e)
   129→      return null
   130→    }
   131→  }
   132→
   133→  private load(): StoredData {
   134→    // Try main file first
   135→    const main = this.loadFile(this.configPath)
   136→    if (main && (main.workspace.projects?.length || 0) > 0) {
   137→      return main
   138→    }
   139→
   140→    // Main file is empty/corrupt/missing — try backup
   141→    const backup = this.loadFile(this.backupPath)
   142→    if (backup && (backup.workspace.projects?.length || 0) > 0) {
   143→      console.log('[SessionStore] Main config empty/corrupt, restored from backup (' +
   144→        backup.workspace.projects.length + ' projects)')
   145→      // Restore backup as main file immediately
   146→      try {
   147→        writeFileSync(this.configPath, JSON.stringify(backup, null, 2))
   148→      } catch (e) {
   149→        console.error('[SessionStore] Failed to restore backup to main:', e)
   150→      }
   151→      return backup
   152→    }
   153→
   154→    // If main loaded but had 0 projects (valid empty state), use it
   155→    if (main) return main
   156→
   157→    return {
   158→      workspace: {
   159→        projects: [],
   160→        openTabs: [],
   161→        activeTabId: null
   162→      }
   163→    }
   164→  }
   165→
   166→  private save(): void {
   167→    try {
   168→      const json = JSON.stringify(this.data, null, 2)
   169→
   170→      // Validate we can parse what we're about to write
   171→      JSON.parse(json)
   172→
   173→      // Back up existing file before overwriting (if it has content)
   174→      if (existsSync(this.configPath)) {
   175→        try {
   176→          const stat = statSync(this.configPath)
   177→          if (stat.size > 0) {
   178→            // Only update backup if existing file is valid and has projects
   179→            const existing = this.loadFile(this.configPath)
   180→            if (existing && (existing.workspace.projects?.length || 0) > 0) {
   181→              writeFileSync(this.backupPath, readFileSync(this.configPath))
   182→            }
   183→          }
   184→        } catch (e) {
   185→          console.error('[SessionStore] Failed to update backup:', e)
   186→        }
   187→      }
   188→
   189→      // Atomic write: write to temp file, then rename
   190→      const tmpPath = this.configPath + '.tmp'
   191→      writeFileSync(tmpPath, json)
   192→
   193→      // Verify the temp file was written completely
   194→      const written = readFileSync(tmpPath, 'utf-8')
   195→      JSON.parse(written) // throws if truncated/corrupt
   196→
   197→      renameSync(tmpPath, this.configPath)
   198→    } catch (e) {
   199→      console.error('[SessionStore] Failed to save workspace:', e)
   200→    }
   201→  }
   202→
   203→  getWorkspace(): Workspace {
   204→    return this.data.workspace
   205→  }
   206→
   207→  // Reload workspace from disk (useful when file was modified externally)
   208→  reloadFromDisk(): void {
   209→    console.log('[SessionStore] Reloading workspace from disk')
   210→    this.data = this.load()
   211→    console.log('[SessionStore] Reloaded, projects:', this.data.workspace?.projects?.length || 0)
   212→  }
   213→
   214→  saveWorkspace(workspace: Workspace): void {
   215→    // Protect against overwriting populated workspace with empty one
   216→    const incomingProjects = workspace?.projects?.length || 0
   217→    const currentProjects = this.data.workspace?.projects?.length || 0
   218→    if (incomingProjects === 0 && currentProjects > 0) {
   219→      console.log('[SessionStore] Rejected empty workspace save - current has', currentProjects, 'projects')
   220→      return
   221→    }
   222→    this.data.workspace = workspace
   223→    this.save()
   224→    syncMetaProjects(workspace)
   225→  }
   226→
   227→  getWindowBounds(): WindowBounds | undefined {
   228→    return this.data.windowBounds
   229→  }
   230→
   231→  saveWindowBounds(bounds: WindowBounds): void {
   232→    this.data.windowBounds = bounds
   233→    this.save()
   234→  }
   235→
   236→  getSettings(): Settings {
   237→    return this.data.settings ?? { defaultProjectDir: '', theme: 'default', backend: 'default' }
   238→  }
   239→
   240→  saveSettings(settings: Settings): void {
   241→    this.data.settings = settings
   242→    this.save()
   243→  }
   244→}
   245→
```

1→import { BrowserWindow, dialog, ipcMain } from 'electron'
     2→import { join } from 'path'
     3→import { readdirSync, statSync } from 'fs'
     4→import { SessionStore } from '../../session-store.js'

     6→import { discoverSessions } from '../../session-discovery.js'
     7→
     8→export function registerWorkspaceHandlers(
     9→  sessionStore: SessionStore,
    10→  getMainWindow: () => BrowserWindow | null
    11→): void {
    12→  ipcMain.handle('workspace:get', () => sessionStore.getWorkspace())
    13→  ipcMain.handle('workspace:save', (_, workspace) => sessionStore.saveWorkspace(workspace))
    14→  ipcMain.handle('workspace:getMetaProjectsPath', () => getMetaProjectsPath())
    15→  ipcMain.handle('workspace:getCategoryMetaPath', (_, categoryName: string) => {
    16→    const basePath = getMetaProjectsPath()
    17→    // Sanitize category name for filesystem
    18→    const safeName = categoryName.replace(/[/\\:*?"<>|]/g, '_')
    19→    return join(basePath, safeName)
    20→  })
    21→  ipcMain.handle('workspace:addProject', async () => {
    22→    const mainWindow = getMainWindow()
    23→    const result = await dialog.showOpenDialog(mainWindow!, {
    24→      properties: ['openDirectory'],
    25→      title: 'Select Project Folder'
    26→    })
    27→    return result.canceled ? null : result.filePaths[0] || null
    28→  })
    29→
    30→  ipcMain.handle('workspace:addProjectsFromParent', async () => {
    31→    const mainWindow = getMainWindow()
    32→    const result = await dialog.showOpenDialog(mainWindow!, {
    33→      properties: ['openDirectory'],
    34→      title: 'Select Parent Folder (all subdirectories will be added as projects)'
    35→    })
    36→    if (result.canceled || !result.filePaths[0]) return null
    37→
    38→    const parentDir = result.filePaths[0]
    39→
    40→    try {
    41→      const entries = readdirSync(parentDir, { withFileTypes: true })
    42→      const subdirs = entries
    43→        .filter((entry) => entry.isDirectory() && !entry.name.startsWith('.'))
    44→        .map((entry) => ({
    45→          path: join(parentDir, entry.name),
    46→          name: entry.name
    47→        }))
    48→      return subdirs
    49→    } catch (e) {
    50→      console.error('Failed to scan parent directory:', e)
    51→      return null
    52→    }
    53→  })
    54→
    55→  // Session discovery
    56→  ipcMain.handle('sessions:discover', (_, projectPath: string, backend?: 'claude' | 'gemini' | 'codex' | 'opencode' | 'aider') => discoverSessions(projectPath, backend))
    57→}

     9→  sessionStore: SessionStore,

    11→): void {
    12→  ipcMain.handle('workspace:get', () => sessionStore.getWorkspace())

    14→  ipcMain.handle('workspace:getMetaProjectsPath', () => getMetaProjectsPath())
    15→  ipcMain.handle('workspace:getCategoryMetaPath', (_, categoryName: string) => {
    16→    const basePath = getMetaProjectsPath()
    17→    // Sanitize category name for filesystem
    18→    const safeName = categoryName.replace(/[/\\:*?"<>|]/g, '_')
    19→    return join(basePath, safeName)
    20→  })
    21→  ipcMain.handle('workspace:addProject', async () => {
    22→    const mainWindow = getMainWindow()
    23→    const result = await dialog.showOpenDialog(mainWindow!, {
    24→      properties: ['openDirectory'],
    25→      title: 'Select Project Folder'
    26→    })

    28→  })
    29→
    30→  ipcMain.handle('workspace:addProjectsFromParent', async () => {
    31→    const mainWindow = getMainWindow()
    32→    const result = await dialog.showOpenDialog(mainWindow!, {
    33→      properties: ['openDirectory'],
    34→      title: 'Select Parent Folder (all subdirectories will be added as projects)'
    35→    })
    36→    if (result.canceled || !result.filePaths[0]) return null
    37→
    38→    const parentDir = result.filePaths[0]
    39→
    40→    try {
    41→      const entries = readdirSync(parentDir, { withFileTypes: true })
    42→      const subdirs = entries
    43→        .filter((entry) => entry.isDirectory() && !entry.name.startsWith('.'))
    44→        .map((entry) => ({
    45→          path: join(parentDir, entry.name),
    46→          name: entry.name
    47→        }))
    48→      return subdirs
    49→    } catch (e) {
    50→      console.error('Failed to scan parent directory:', e)

    52→    }

    57→}

1→/**
     2→ * API Module
     3→ *
     4→ * Provides a unified API client that works with both Electron IPC and HTTP transport.
     5→ * Import from this module to get the appropriate client for your environment.
     6→ */
     7→
     8→import { Api } from './types'
     9→import { ElectronBackend, isElectronAvailable } from './electron-backend'
    10→import { HttpBackend } from './http-backend'
    11→
    12→// =============================================================================
    13→// API Instance Management
    14→// =============================================================================
    15→
    16→let apiInstance: Api | null = null
    17→
    18→/**
    19→ * Check if running in Electron environment with electronAPI available
    20→ */
    21→export function isElectronEnvironment(): boolean {
    22→  return isElectronAvailable()
    23→}
    24→
    25→/**
    26→ * Get the current API instance (may be null if not initialized)
    27→ */
    28→export function getApi(): Api | null {
    29→  return apiInstance
    30→}
    31→
    32→/**
    33→ * Initialize the API with the appropriate backend
    34→ * - In Electron: Automatically uses ElectronBackend
    35→ * - In browser/Capacitor: Requires config parameter for HttpBackend
    36→ */
    37→export function initializeApi(config?: { host: string; port: number; token: string }): Api {
    38→  if (isElectronEnvironment()) {
    39→    apiInstance = new ElectronBackend()
    40→  } else if (config) {
    41→    apiInstance = new HttpBackend(config)
    42→  } else {
    43→    throw new Error('HTTP backend requires connection config')
    44→  }
    45→  return apiInstance
    46→}
    47→
    48→/**
    49→ * Set the API instance directly (useful for testing or custom backends)
    50→ */
    51→export function setApi(api: Api): void {
    52→  apiInstance = api
    53→}
    54→
    55→/**
    56→ * Clear the API instance
    57→ */
    58→export function clearApi(): void {
    59→  apiInstance = null
    60→}

1→import { create } from 'zustand'
     2→import { clearProjectCaches } from '../utils/lruCache'
     3→
     4→export interface ProjectCategory {
     5→  id: string
     6→  name: string
     7→  collapsed: boolean
     8→  order: number
     9→}
    10→
    11→export interface Project {
    12→  path: string
    13→  name: string
    14→  executable?: string
    15→  apiPort?: number
    16→  apiAutoStart?: boolean
    17→  apiSessionMode?: 'existing' | 'new-keep' | 'new-close'
    18→  apiModel?: 'default' | 'opus' | 'sonnet' | 'haiku'
    19→  autoAcceptTools?: string[]
    20→  permissionMode?: string
    21→  color?: string
    22→  ttsVoice?: string
    23→  ttsEngine?: 'piper' | 'xtts'
    24→  backend?: 'default' | 'claude' | 'gemini' | 'codex' | 'opencode' | 'aider'
    25→  categoryId?: string
    26→  order?: number
    27→}
    28→
    29→export interface OpenTab {
    30→  id: string
    31→  projectPath: string
    32→  sessionId?: string
    33→  title: string
    34→  ptyId: string
    35→  backend?: 'default' | 'claude' | 'gemini' | 'codex' | 'opencode' | 'aider'
    36→}
    37→
    38→interface WorkspaceState {
    39→  projects: Project[]
    40→  openTabs: OpenTab[]
    41→  activeTabId: string | null
    42→  categories: ProjectCategory[]
    43→
    44→  setProjects: (projects: Project[]) => void
    45→  addProject: (project: Project) => void
    46→  removeProject: (path: string) => void
    47→  updateProject: (path: string, updates: Partial<Project>) => void
    48→
    49→  addTab: (tab: OpenTab) => void
    50→  removeTab: (id: string) => void
    51→  updateTab: (id: string, updates: Partial<OpenTab>) => void
    52→  setActiveTab: (id: string) => void
    53→  clearTabs: () => void
    54→
    55→  setCategories: (categories: ProjectCategory[]) => void
    56→  addCategory: (name: string) => string
    57→  updateCategory: (id: string, updates: Partial<ProjectCategory>) => void
    58→  removeCategory: (id: string) => void
    59→  reorderCategories: (ids: string[]) => void
    60→  moveProjectToCategory: (projectPath: string, categoryId: string | null) => void
    61→  reorderProjects: (categoryId: string | null, projectPaths: string[]) => void
    62→}
    63→
    64→const generateCategoryId = (): string =>
    65→  `cat-${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`
    66→
    67→export const useWorkspaceStore = create<WorkspaceState>((set, get) => ({
    68→  projects: [],
    69→  openTabs: [],
    70→  activeTabId: null,
    71→  categories: [],
    72→
    73→  setProjects: (projects) => set({ projects }),
    74→
    75→  addProject: (project) => {
    76→    const { projects } = get()
    77→    if (!projects.find((p) => p.path === project.path)) {
    78→      set({ projects: [...projects, project] })
    79→    }
    80→  },
    81→
    82→  removeProject: (path) => {
    83→    const { projects } = get()
    84→    clearProjectCaches(path)
    85→    set({ projects: projects.filter((p) => p.path !== path) })
    86→  },
    87→
    88→  updateProject: (path, updates) => {
    89→    const { projects } = get()
    90→    set({
    91→      projects: projects.map((p) =>
    92→        p.path === path ? { ...p, ...updates } : p
    93→      )
    94→    })
    95→  },
    96→
    97→  addTab: (tab) => {
    98→    const { openTabs } = get()
    99→    set({
   100→      openTabs: [...openTabs, tab],
   101→      activeTabId: tab.id
   102→    })
   103→  },
   104→
   105→  removeTab: (id) => {
   106→    const { openTabs, activeTabId } = get()
   107→    const newTabs = openTabs.filter((t) => t.id !== id)
   108→    let newActiveId = activeTabId
   109→
   110→    if (activeTabId === id) {
   111→      const index = openTabs.findIndex((t) => t.id === id)
   112→      if (newTabs.length > 0) {
   113→        newActiveId = newTabs[Math.min(index, newTabs.length - 1)].id
   114→      } else {
   115→        newActiveId = null
   116→      }
   117→    }
   118→
   119→    set({ openTabs: newTabs, activeTabId: newActiveId })
   120→  },
   121→
   122→  updateTab: (id, updates) => {
   123→    const { openTabs } = get()
   124→    set({
   125→      openTabs: openTabs.map((t) =>
   126→        t.id === id ? { ...t, ...updates } : t
   127→      )
   128→    })
   129→  },
   130→
   131→  setActiveTab: (id) => set({ activeTabId: id }),
   132→
   133→  clearTabs: () => set({ openTabs: [], activeTabId: null }),
   134→
   135→  setCategories: (categories) => set({ categories }),
   136→
   137→  addCategory: (name) => {
   138→    const { categories } = get()
   139→    const id = generateCategoryId()
   140→    const maxOrder = categories.reduce((max, c) => Math.max(max, c.order), -1)
   141→    set({
   142→      categories: [...categories, { id, name, collapsed: false, order: maxOrder + 1 }]
   143→    })
   144→    return id
   145→  },
   146→
   147→  updateCategory: (id, updates) => {
   148→    const { categories } = get()
   149→    set({
   150→      categories: categories.map((c) =>
   151→        c.id === id ? { ...c, ...updates } : c
   152→      )
   153→    })
   154→  },
   155→
   156→  removeCategory: (id) => {
   157→    const { categories, projects } = get()
   158→    set({
   159→      categories: categories.filter((c) => c.id !== id),
   160→      projects: projects.map((p) =>
   161→        p.categoryId === id ? { ...p, categoryId: undefined } : p
   162→      )
   163→    })
   164→  },
   165→
   166→  reorderCategories: (ids) => {
   167→    const { categories } = get()
   168→    set({
   169→      categories: categories.map((c) => ({
   170→        ...c,
   171→        order: ids.indexOf(c.id)
   172→      }))
   173→    })
   174→  },
   175→
   176→  moveProjectToCategory: (projectPath, categoryId) => {
   177→    const { projects } = get()
   178→    const categoryProjects = projects.filter((p) =>
   179→      categoryId === null ? !p.categoryId : p.categoryId === categoryId
   180→    )
   181→    const maxOrder = categoryProjects.reduce((max, p) => Math.max(max, p.order ?? -1), -1)
   182→    set({
   183→      projects: projects.map((p) =>
   184→        p.path === projectPath
   185→          ? { ...p, categoryId: categoryId ?? undefined, order: maxOrder + 1 }
   186→          : p
   187→      )
   188→    })
   189→  },
   190→
   191→  reorderProjects: (categoryId, projectPaths) => {
   192→    const { projects } = get()
   193→    set({
   194→      projects: projects.map((p) => {
   195→        const index = projectPaths.indexOf(p.path)
   196→        if (index >= 0) {
   197→          return { ...p, order: index }
   198→        }
   199→        return p
   200→      })
   201→    })
   202→  }
   203→}))
   204→

import React, { useState, useRef, useMemo } from 'react'
import { Project, useWorkspaceStore } from '../../stores/workspace.js'
import { useVoice } from '../../contexts/VoiceContext.js'
import { SidebarProps, OpenTab, ClaudeSession } from './types.js'
import { useSessions, useDragAndDrop, useProjectSettingsModal } from './hooks/index.js'

export interface SidebarState {
  // Voice context
  volume: number
  setVolume: (v: number) => void
  speed: number
  setSpeed: (s: number) => void
  skipOnNew: boolean
  setSkipOnNew: (s: boolean) => void
  voiceOutputEnabled: boolean

  // Workspace store
  categories: ReturnType<typeof useWorkspaceStore.getState>['categories']
  addCategory: (name: string) => string
  updateCategory: (id: string, updates: Partial<{ name: string; collapsed: boolean }>) => void
  removeCategory: (id: string) => void
  reorderCategories: (categoryIds: string[]) => void
  moveProjectToCategory: (projectPath: string, categoryId: string | null) => void
  reorderProjects: (categoryId: string | null, projectPaths: string[]) => void

  // Custom hooks
  expandedProject: string | null
  sessions: Record<string, ClaudeSession[]>
  toggleProject: (e: React.MouseEvent, projectPath: string) => void
  handleOpenSession: (
    projectPath: string,
    sessionId?: string,
    slug?: string,
    isNewSession?: boolean
  ) => void

  // Drag and drop
  draggedProject: string | null
  draggedCategory: string | null
  dropTarget: { type: 'category' | 'project' | 'uncategorized'; id: string | null; position?: 'before' | 'after' } | null
  handleProjectDragStart: (e: React.DragEvent, projectPath: string) => void
  handleProjectDragEnd: () => void
  handleCategoryDragOver: (e: React.DragEvent, categoryId: string | null) => void
  handleCategoryDrop: (e: React.DragEvent, categoryId: string | null) => void
  handleProjectDragOver: (e: React.DragEvent, projectPath: string, position: 'before' | 'after') => void
  handleProjectDrop: (e: React.DragEvent, projectPath: string, categoryId: string | undefined) => void
  handleCategoryDragStart: (e: React.DragEvent, categoryId: string) => void
  handleCategoryDragEnd: () => void
  handleCategoryHeaderDragOver: (e: React.DragEvent, categoryId: string, position: 'before' | 'after') => void
  handleCategoryHeaderDrop: (e: React.DragEvent, categoryId: string) => void

  // Project settings modal
  projectSettingsModal: ReturnType<typeof useProjectSettingsModal>['projectSettingsModal']
  installedVoices: ReturnType<typeof useProjectSettingsModal>['installedVoices']
  globalVoiceSettings: ReturnType<typeof useProjectSettingsModal>['globalVoiceSettings']
  globalPermissions: ReturnType<typeof useProjectSettingsModal>['globalPermissions']
  apiStatus: ReturnType<typeof useProjectSettingsModal>['apiStatus']
  setApiStatus: ReturnType<typeof useProjectSettingsModal>['setApiStatus']
  handleOpenProjectSettings: ReturnType<typeof useProjectSettingsModal>['handleOpenProjectSettings']
  handleSaveProjectSettings: ReturnType<typeof useProjectSettingsModal>['handleSaveProjectSettings']
  handleToggleApi: ReturnType<typeof useProjectSettingsModal>['handleToggleApi']
  setProjectSettingsModal: ReturnType<typeof useProjectSettingsModal>['setProjectSettingsModal']
  handleToggleTool: ReturnType<typeof useProjectSettingsModal>['handleToggleTool']
  handleAllowAll: ReturnType<typeof useProjectSettingsModal>['handleAllowAll']
  handleClearAll: ReturnType<typeof useProjectSettingsModal>['handleClearAll']
  handleProjectSettingsChange: ReturnType<typeof useProjectSettingsModal>['handleProjectSettingsChange']

  // Local state
  beadsExpanded: boolean
  setBeadsExpanded: (v: boolean) => void
  isResizing: boolean
  setIsResizing: (v: boolean) => void
  contextMenu: { x: number; y: number; project: Project } | null
  setContextMenu: (v: { x: number; y: number; project: Project } | null) => void
  categoryContextMenu: {
    x: number
    y: number
    category: ReturnType<typeof useWorkspaceStore.getState>['categories'][0]
  } | null
  setCategoryContextMenu: (
    v: {
      x: number
      y: number
      category: ReturnType<typeof useWorkspaceStore.getState>['categories'][0]
    } | null
  ) => void
  editingProject: { path: string; name: string } | null
  setEditingProject: React.Dispatch<React.SetStateAction<{ path: string; name: string } | null>>
  editingCategory: { id: string; name: string } | null
  setEditingCategory: (v: { id: string; name: string } | null) => void
  isDebugMode: boolean
  setIsDebugMode: (v: boolean) => void
  extensionBrowserModal: { project: Project } | null
  setExtensionBrowserModal: (v: { project: Project } | null) => void
  claudeMdEditorModal: { project: Project } | null
  setClaudeMdEditorModal: (v: { project: Project } | null) => void
  deleteConfirmModal: { project: Project } | null
  setDeleteConfirmModal: (v: { project: Project } | null) => void
  taskCounts: Record<string, { open: number; inProgress: number }>
  setTaskCounts: (v: Record<string, { open: number; inProgress: number }>) => void

  // Refs
  sidebarRef: React.RefObject<HTMLDivElement>
  editInputRef: React.RefObject<HTMLInputElement>
  categoryEditInputRef: React.RefObject<HTMLInputElement>

  // Computed values
  focusedTabId: string | null
  focusedTab: OpenTab | undefined
  focusedProjectPath: string | null
  focusedTabPtyId: string | null
  beadsProjectPath: string | null
  focusedProject: Project | undefined
  sortedCategories: ReturnType<typeof useWorkspaceStore.getState>['categories']
  projectsByCategory: Record<string, Project[]>
}

export interface UseSidebarStateParams {
  projects: Project[]
  openTabs: OpenTab[]
  activeTabId: string | null
  lastFocusedTabId: string | null
  onOpenSession: SidebarProps['onOpenSession']
  onSwitchToTab: SidebarProps['onSwitchToTab']
  onUpdateProject: SidebarProps['onUpdateProject']
}

export function useSidebarState(params: UseSidebarStateParams): SidebarState {
  const { projects, openTabs, activeTabId, lastFocusedTabId, onOpenSession, onSwitchToTab, onUpdateProject } = params

  // Voice context
  const { volume, setVolume, speed, setSpeed, skipOnNew, setSkipOnNew, voiceOutputEnabled } =
    useVoice()

  // Workspace store
  const categories = useWorkspaceStore((state) => state.categories)
  const addCategory = useWorkspaceStore((state) => state.addCategory)
  const updateCategory = useWorkspaceStore((state) => state.updateCategory)
  const removeCategory = useWorkspaceStore((state) => state.removeCategory)
  const reorderCategories = useWorkspaceStore((state) => state.reorderCategories)
  const moveProjectToCategory = useWorkspaceStore((state) => state.moveProjectToCategory)
  const reorderProjects = useWorkspaceStore((state) => state.reorderProjects)

  // Custom hooks for extracted logic
  const { expandedProject, sessions, toggleProject, handleOpenSession } = useSessions({
    projects,
    openTabs,
    onOpenSession,
    onSwitchToTab,
  })

  const {
    draggedProject,
    draggedCategory,
    dropTarget,
    handleProjectDragStart,
    handleProjectDragEnd,
    handleCategoryDragOver,
    handleCategoryDrop,
    handleProjectDragOver,
    handleProjectDrop,
    handleCategoryDragStart,
    handleCategoryDragEnd,
    handleCategoryHeaderDragOver,
    handleCategoryHeaderDrop,
  } = useDragAndDrop({
    projects,
    moveProjectToCategory,
    reorderProjects,
    reorderCategories,
    categories,
  })

  const {
    projectSettingsModal,
    installedVoices,
    globalVoiceSettings,
    globalPermissions,
    apiStatus,
    setApiStatus,
    handleOpenProjectSettings,
    handleSaveProjectSettings,
    handleToggleApi,
    setProjectSettingsModal,
    handleToggleTool,
    handleAllowAll,
    handleClearAll,
    handleProjectSettingsChange,
  } = useProjectSettingsModal({ onUpdateProject })

  // Local state
  const [beadsExpanded, setBeadsExpanded] = useState(true)
  const [isResizing, setIsResizing] = useState(false)
  const [contextMenu, setContextMenu] = useState<{ x: number; y: number; project: Project } | null>(
    null
  )
  const [categoryContextMenu, setCategoryContextMenu] = useState<{
    x: number
    y: number
    category: ReturnType<typeof useWorkspaceStore.getState>['categories'][0]
  } | null>(null)
  const [editingProject, setEditingProject] = useState<{ path: string; name: string } | null>(null)
  const [editingCategory, setEditingCategory] = useState<{ id: string; name: string } | null>(null)
  const [isDebugMode, setIsDebugMode] = useState(false)
  const [extensionBrowserModal, setExtensionBrowserModal] = useState<{ project: Project } | null>(
    null
  )
  const [claudeMdEditorModal, setClaudeMdEditorModal] = useState<{ project: Project } | null>(null)
  const [deleteConfirmModal, setDeleteConfirmModal] = useState<{ project: Project } | null>(null)
  const [taskCounts, setTaskCounts] = useState<Record<string, { open: number; inProgress: number }>>(
    {}
  )

  // Refs
  const sidebarRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
  const editInputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null)
  const categoryEditInputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null)

  // Computed values
  const focusedTabId = lastFocusedTabId || activeTabId
  const focusedTab = useMemo(
    () => openTabs.find((t) => t.id === focusedTabId),
    [openTabs, focusedTabId]
  )
  const focusedProjectPath = useMemo(() => focusedTab?.projectPath || null, [focusedTab])
  const focusedTabPtyId = useMemo(() => focusedTab?.ptyId || null, [focusedTab])
  const beadsProjectPath = useMemo(
    () => focusedProjectPath || expandedProject,
    [focusedProjectPath, expandedProject]
  )
  const focusedProject = useMemo(
    () => projects.find((p) => p.path === focusedProjectPath),
    [projects, focusedProjectPath]
  )

  // Computed groupings
  const sortedCategories = useMemo(
    () => [...categories].sort((a, b) => a.order - b.order),
    [categories]
  )

  const projectsByCategory = useMemo(() => {
    const grouped: Record<string, Project[]> = {}
    sortedCategories.forEach((cat) => {
      grouped[cat.id] = []
    })
    grouped['uncategorized'] = []

    projects.forEach((project) => {
      const key = project.categoryId || 'uncategorized'
      if (!grouped[key]) grouped[key] = []
      grouped[key].push(project)
    })

    Object.keys(grouped).forEach((key) => {
      grouped[key].sort((a, b) => (a.order ?? 0) - (b.order ?? 0))
    })

    return grouped
  }, [projects, sortedCategories])

  return {
    // Voice context
    volume,
    setVolume,
    speed,
    setSpeed,
    skipOnNew,
    setSkipOnNew,
    voiceOutputEnabled,

    // Workspace store
    categories,
    addCategory,
    updateCategory,
    removeCategory,
    reorderCategories,
    moveProjectToCategory,
    reorderProjects,

    // Sessions hook
    expandedProject,
    sessions,
    toggleProject,
    handleOpenSession,

    // Drag and drop hook
    draggedProject,
    draggedCategory,
    dropTarget,
    handleProjectDragStart,
    handleProjectDragEnd,
    handleCategoryDragOver,
    handleCategoryDrop,
    handleProjectDragOver,
    handleProjectDrop,
    handleCategoryDragStart,
    handleCategoryDragEnd,
    handleCategoryHeaderDragOver,
    handleCategoryHeaderDrop,

    // Project settings modal hook
    projectSettingsModal,
    installedVoices,
    globalVoiceSettings,
    globalPermissions,
    apiStatus,
    setApiStatus,
    handleOpenProjectSettings,
    handleSaveProjectSettings,
    handleToggleApi,
    setProjectSettingsModal,
    handleToggleTool,
    handleAllowAll,
    handleClearAll,
    handleProjectSettingsChange,

    // Local state
    beadsExpanded,
    setBeadsExpanded,
    isResizing,
    setIsResizing,
    contextMenu,
    setContextMenu,
    categoryContextMenu,
    setCategoryContextMenu,
    editingProject,
    setEditingProject,
    editingCategory,
    setEditingCategory,
    isDebugMode,
    setIsDebugMode,
    extensionBrowserModal,
    setExtensionBrowserModal,
    claudeMdEditorModal,
    setClaudeMdEditorModal,
    deleteConfirmModal,
    setDeleteConfirmModal,
    taskCounts,
    setTaskCounts,

    // Refs
    sidebarRef,
    editInputRef,
    categoryEditInputRef,

    // Computed values
    focusedTabId,
    focusedTab,
    focusedProjectPath,
    focusedTabPtyId,
    beadsProjectPath,
    focusedProject,
    sortedCategories,
    projectsByCategory,
  }
}

   128→export function useSidebarState(params: UseSidebarStateParams): SidebarState {
   129→  const { projects, openTabs, activeTabId, lastFocusedTabId, onOpenSession, onSwitchToTab, onUpdateProject } = params
   130→
   131→  // Voice context

   134→

   139→  const removeCategory = useWorkspaceStore((state) => state.removeCategory)
   140→  const reorderCategories = useWorkspaceStore((state) => state.reorderCategories)
   141→  const moveProjectToCategory = useWorkspaceStore((state) => state.moveProjectToCategory)
   142→  const reorderProjects = useWorkspaceStore((state) => state.reorderProjects)
   143→
   144→  // Custom hooks for extracted logic
   145→  const { expandedProject, sessions, toggleProject, handleOpenSession } = useSessions({
   146→    projects,
   147→    openTabs,
   148→    onOpenSession,
   149→    onSwitchToTab,
   150→  })
   151→
   152→  const {
   153→    draggedProject,
   154→    draggedCategory,
   155→    dropTarget,
   156→    handleProjectDragStart,
   157→    handleProjectDragEnd,
   158→    handleCategoryDragOver,
   159→    handleCategoryDrop,
   160→    handleProjectDragOver,
   161→    handleProjectDrop,
   162→    handleCategoryDragStart,
   163→    handleCategoryDragEnd,
   164→    handleCategoryHeaderDragOver,
   165→    handleCategoryHeaderDrop,
   166→  } = useDragAndDrop({
   167→    projects,
   168→    moveProjectToCategory,
   169→    reorderProjects,
   170→    reorderCategories,
   171→    categories,
   172→  })
   173→
   174→  const {
   175→    projectSettingsModal,
   176→    installedVoices,
   177→    globalVoiceSettings,
   178→    globalPermissions,
   179→    apiStatus,
   180→    setApiStatus,
   181→    handleOpenProjectSettings,
   182→    handleSaveProjectSettings,
   183→    handleToggleApi,
   184→    setProjectSettingsModal,
   185→    handleToggleTool,
   186→    handleAllowAll,
   187→    handleClearAll,
   188→    handleProjectSettingsChange,
   189→  } = useProjectSettingsModal({ onUpdateProject })
   190→
   191→  // Local state
   192→  const [beadsExpanded, setBeadsExpanded] = useState(true)
   193→  const [isResizing, setIsResizing] = useState(false)
   194→  const [contextMenu, setContextMenu] = useState<{ x: number; y: number; project: Project } | null>(
   195→    null
   196→  )
   197→  const [categoryContextMenu, setCategoryContextMenu] = useState<{
   198→    x: number

   201→  } | null>(null)
   202→  const [editingProject, setEditingProject] = useState<{ path: string; name: string } | null>(null)
   203→  const [editingCategory, setEditingCategory] = useState<{ id: string; name: string } | null>(null)

   206→    null

   212→  )
   213→

   216→  const editInputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null)
   217→  const categoryEditInputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null)
   218→
   219→  // Computed values
   220→  const focusedTabId = lastFocusedTabId || activeTabId
   221→  const focusedTab = useMemo(
   222→    () => openTabs.find((t) => t.id === focusedTabId),
   223→    [openTabs, focusedTabId]
   224→  )
   225→  const focusedProjectPath = useMemo(() => focusedTab?.projectPath || null, [focusedTab])
   226→  const focusedTabPtyId = useMemo(() => focusedTab?.ptyId || null, [focusedTab])
   227→  const beadsProjectPath = useMemo(
   228→    () => focusedProjectPath || expandedProject,
   229→    [focusedProjectPath, expandedProject]
   230→  )
   231→  const focusedProject = useMemo(
   232→    () => projects.find((p) => p.path === focusedProjectPath),
   233→    [projects, focusedProjectPath]
   234→  )
   235→
   236→  // Computed groupings
   237→  const sortedCategories = useMemo(
   238→    () => [...categories].sort((a, b) => a.order - b.order),
   239→    [categories]
   240→  )
   241→
   242→  const projectsByCategory = useMemo(() => {
   243→    const grouped: Record<string, Project[]> = {}
   244→    sortedCategories.forEach((cat) => {
   245→      grouped[cat.id] = []
   246→    })
   247→    grouped['uncategorized'] = []
   248→
   249→    projects.forEach((project) => {
   250→      const key = project.categoryId || 'uncategorized'
   251→      if (!grouped[key]) grouped[key] = []
   252→      grouped[key].push(project)

   254→
   255→    Object.keys(grouped).forEach((key) => {
   256→      grouped[key].sort((a, b) => (a.order ?? 0) - (b.order ?? 0))
   257→    })
   258→
   259→    return grouped
   260→  }, [projects, sortedCategories])

   272→    // Workspace store

   278→    moveProjectToCategory,
   279→    reorderProjects,
   280→
   281→    // Sessions hook
   282→    expandedProject,
   283→    sessions,
   284→    toggleProject,

   295→    handleProjectDragOver,
   296→    handleProjectDrop,
   297→    handleCategoryDragStart,
   298→    handleCategoryDragEnd,

   305→    globalVoiceSettings,
   306→    globalPermissions,
   307→    apiStatus,
   308→    setApiStatus,
   309→    handleOpenProjectSettings,
   310→    handleSaveProjectSettings,
   311→    handleToggleApi,
   312→    setProjectSettingsModal,
   313→    handleToggleTool,
   314→    handleAllowAll,

1→import { useCallback, useRef } from 'react'
     2→import { Project, useWorkspaceStore } from '../../stores/workspace.js'
     3→import { SidebarState } from './useSidebarState.js'
     4→import { SidebarProps } from './types.js'
     5→
     6→// Use type assertion for extended electronAPI methods not in the base type
     7→const electronAPI = window.electronAPI as (typeof window.electronAPI) & {
     8→  selectExecutable?: () => Promise<string | null>
     9→  runExecutable?: (executable: string, cwd: string) => Promise<{ success: boolean; error?: string }>
    10→  getCategoryMetaPath?: (categoryName: string) => Promise<string>
    11→  getMetaProjectsPath?: () => Promise<string>
    12→}
    13→
    14→export interface SidebarHandlers {
    15→  // Project handlers
    16→  handleSelectExecutable: (project: Project) => Promise<void>
    17→  handleClearExecutable: (project: Project) => void
    18→  handleRunExecutable: (project: Project) => Promise<void>
    19→
    20→  // Rename handlers
    21→  handleStartRename: (e: React.MouseEvent, project: Project) => void
    22→  handleRenameSubmit: () => void
    23→  handleRenameKeyDown: (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => void
    24→
    25→  // Category handlers
    26→  handleAddCategory: () => void
    27→  handleOpenCategoryAsProject: (categoryName: string) => Promise<void>
    28→  handleOpenAllProjects: () => Promise<void>
    29→  handleStartCategoryRename: (
    30→    category: ReturnType<typeof useWorkspaceStore.getState>['categories'][0]
    31→  ) => void
    32→  handleCategoryRenameSubmit: () => void
    33→  handleCategoryRenameKeyDown: (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => void
    34→  toggleCategoryCollapse: (categoryId: string) => void
    35→
    36→  // Resize handler
    37→  handleMouseDown: (e: React.MouseEvent) => void
    38→
    39→  // Backdrop handler
    40→  handleBackdropClick: () => void
    41→}
    42→
    43→export interface UseSidebarHandlersParams {
    44→  state: SidebarState
    45→  onUpdateProject: SidebarProps['onUpdateProject']
    46→  onOpenSession: SidebarProps['onOpenSession']
    47→  isMobile: boolean
    48→  onMobileClose: (() => void) | undefined
    49→}
    50→
    51→export function useSidebarHandlers(params: UseSidebarHandlersParams): SidebarHandlers {
    52→  const { state, onUpdateProject, onOpenSession, isMobile, onMobileClose } = params
    53→  const {
    54→    setContextMenu,
    55→    editingProject,
    56→    setEditingProject,
    57→    editInputRef,
    58→    editingCategory,
    59→    setEditingCategory,
    60→    categoryEditInputRef,
    61→    addCategory,
    62→    updateCategory,
    63→    categories,
    64→    setIsResizing,
    65→    moveProjectToCategory,
    66→  } = state
    67→
    68→  // Project handlers
    69→  const handleSelectExecutable = useCallback(
    70→    async (project: Project) => {
    71→      const executable = await electronAPI?.selectExecutable?.()
    72→      if (executable) onUpdateProject(project.path, { executable })
    73→      setContextMenu(null)
    74→    },
    75→    [onUpdateProject, setContextMenu]
    76→  )
    77→
    78→  const handleClearExecutable = useCallback(
    79→    (project: Project) => {
    80→      onUpdateProject(project.path, { executable: undefined })
    81→      setContextMenu(null)
    82→    },
    83→    [onUpdateProject, setContextMenu]
    84→  )
    85→
    86→  const handleRunExecutable = useCallback(
    87→    async (project: Project) => {
    88→      if (project.executable) {
    89→        const result = await electronAPI?.runExecutable?.(project.executable, project.path)
    90→        if (result && !result.success) console.error('Failed to run executable:', result.error)
    91→      }
    92→      setContextMenu(null)
    93→    },
    94→    [setContextMenu]
    95→  )
    96→
    97→  // Rename handlers
    98→  // Ref tracks cancel intent so blur handler can skip saving after Escape
    99→  const renameCancelledRef = useRef(false)
   100→
   101→  const handleStartRename = useCallback(
   102→    (e: React.MouseEvent, project: Project) => {
   103→      e.stopPropagation()
   104→      renameCancelledRef.current = false
   105→      setEditingProject({ path: project.path, name: project.name })
   106→      setTimeout(() => editInputRef.current?.select(), 0)
   107→    },
   108→    [setEditingProject, editInputRef]
   109→  )
   110→
   111→  const handleRenameSubmit = useCallback(() => {
   112→    if (renameCancelledRef.current) {
   113→      renameCancelledRef.current = false
   114→      return
   115→    }
   116→    if (editingProject && editingProject.name.trim()) {
   117→      onUpdateProject(editingProject.path, { name: editingProject.name.trim() })
   118→    }
   119→    setEditingProject(null)
   120→  }, [editingProject, onUpdateProject, setEditingProject])
   121→
   122→  const handleRenameKeyDown = useCallback(
   123→    (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {
   124→      if (e.key === 'Enter') handleRenameSubmit()
   125→      else if (e.key === 'Escape') {
   126→        renameCancelledRef.current = true
   127→        setEditingProject(null)
   128→      }
   129→    },
   130→    [handleRenameSubmit, setEditingProject]
   131→  )
   132→
   133→  // Category handlers
   134→  const handleAddCategory = useCallback(() => {
   135→    const newId = addCategory('New Category')
   136→    setEditingCategory({ id: newId, name: 'New Category' })
   137→    setTimeout(() => categoryEditInputRef.current?.select(), 0)
   138→  }, [addCategory, setEditingCategory, categoryEditInputRef])
   139→
   140→  const handleOpenCategoryAsProject = useCallback(
   141→    async (categoryName: string) => {
   142→      const metaPath = await electronAPI?.getCategoryMetaPath?.(categoryName)
   143→      if (metaPath) onOpenSession(metaPath)
   144→    },
   145→    [onOpenSession]
   146→  )
   147→
   148→  const handleOpenAllProjects = useCallback(async () => {
   149→    const metaPath = await electronAPI?.getMetaProjectsPath?.()
   150→    if (metaPath) onOpenSession(metaPath)
   151→  }, [onOpenSession])
   152→
   153→  // Category rename cancel ref (same pattern as project rename)
   154→  const categoryRenameCancelledRef = useRef(false)
   155→
   156→  const handleStartCategoryRename = useCallback(
   157→    (category: ReturnType<typeof useWorkspaceStore.getState>['categories'][0]) => {
   158→      categoryRenameCancelledRef.current = false
   159→      setEditingCategory({ id: category.id, name: category.name })
   160→      setTimeout(() => categoryEditInputRef.current?.select(), 0)
   161→    },
   162→    [setEditingCategory, categoryEditInputRef]
   163→  )
   164→
   165→  const handleCategoryRenameSubmit = useCallback(() => {
   166→    if (categoryRenameCancelledRef.current) {
   167→      categoryRenameCancelledRef.current = false
   168→      return
   169→    }
   170→    if (editingCategory && editingCategory.name.trim()) {
   171→      updateCategory(editingCategory.id, { name: editingCategory.name.trim() })
   172→    }
   173→    setEditingCategory(null)
   174→  }, [editingCategory, updateCategory, setEditingCategory])
   175→
   176→  const handleCategoryRenameKeyDown = useCallback(
   177→    (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {
   178→      if (e.key === 'Enter') handleCategoryRenameSubmit()
   179→      else if (e.key === 'Escape') {
   180→        categoryRenameCancelledRef.current = true
   181→        setEditingCategory(null)
   182→      }
   183→    },
   184→    [handleCategoryRenameSubmit, setEditingCategory]
   185→  )
   186→
   187→  const toggleCategoryCollapse = useCallback(
   188→    (categoryId: string) => {
   189→      const category = categories.find((c) => c.id === categoryId)
   190→      if (category) updateCategory(categoryId, { collapsed: !category.collapsed })
   191→    },
   192→    [categories, updateCategory]
   193→  )
   194→
   195→  // Resize handler
   196→  const handleMouseDown = useCallback(
   197→    (e: React.MouseEvent) => {
   198→      e.preventDefault()
   199→      setIsResizing(true)
   200→    },
   201→    [setIsResizing]
   202→  )
   203→
   204→  // Backdrop handler
   205→  const handleBackdropClick = useCallback(() => {
   206→    if (isMobile && onMobileClose) {
   207→      onMobileClose()
   208→    }
   209→  }, [isMobile, onMobileClose])
   210→
   211→  return {
   212→    handleSelectExecutable,
   213→    handleClearExecutable,
   214→    handleRunExecutable,
   215→    handleStartRename,
   216→    handleRenameSubmit,
   217→    handleRenameKeyDown,
   218→    handleAddCategory,
   219→    handleOpenCategoryAsProject,
   220→    handleOpenAllProjects,
   221→    handleStartCategoryRename,
   222→    handleCategoryRenameSubmit,
   223→    handleCategoryRenameKeyDown,
   224→    toggleCategoryCollapse,
   225→    handleMouseDown,
   226→    handleBackdropClick,
   227→  }
   228→}
   229→
   230→// Helper for creating category with project
   231→export function useCreateCategoryWithProject(

     1→import { useCallback, useRef } from 'react'
     2→import { Project, useWorkspaceStore } from '../../stores/workspace.js'
     3→import { SidebarState } from './useSidebarState.js'
     4→import { SidebarProps } from './types.js'
     5→
     6→// Use type assertion for extended electronAPI methods not in the base type
     7→const electronAPI = window.electronAPI as (typeof window.electronAPI) & {
     8→  selectExecutable?: () => Promise<string | null>
     9→  runExecutable?: (executable: string, cwd: string) => Promise<{ success: boolean; error?: string }>
    10→  getCategoryMetaPath?: (categoryName: string) => Promise<string>
    11→  getMetaProjectsPath?: () => Promise<string>
    12→}
    13→
    14→export interface SidebarHandlers {
    15→  // Project handlers
    16→  handleSelectExecutable: (project: Project) => Promise<void>
    17→  handleClearExecutable: (project: Project) => void
    18→  handleRunExecutable: (project: Project) => Promise<void>
    19→
    20→  // Rename handlers
    21→  handleStartRename: (e: React.MouseEvent, project: Project) => void
    22→  handleRenameSubmit: () => void
    23→  handleRenameKeyDown: (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => void
    24→
    25→  // Category handlers
    26→  handleAddCategory: () => void
    27→  handleOpenCategoryAsProject: (categoryName: string) => Promise<void>
    28→  handleOpenAllProjects: () => Promise<void>
    29→  handleStartCategoryRename: (
    30→    category: ReturnType<typeof useWorkspaceStore.getState>['categories'][0]
    31→  ) => void
    32→  handleCategoryRenameSubmit: () => void
    33→  handleCategoryRenameKeyDown: (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => void
    34→  toggleCategoryCollapse: (categoryId: string) => void
    35→
    36→  // Resize handler
    37→  handleMouseDown: (e: React.MouseEvent) => void
    38→
    39→  // Backdrop handler
    40→  handleBackdropClick: () => void
    41→}
    42→
    43→export interface UseSidebarHandlersParams {
    44→  state: SidebarState
    45→  onUpdateProject: SidebarProps['onUpdateProject']
    46→  onOpenSession: SidebarProps['onOpenSession']
    47→  isMobile: boolean
    48→  onMobileClose: (() => void) | undefined
    49→}
    50→
    51→export function useSidebarHandlers(params: UseSidebarHandlersParams): SidebarHandlers {
    52→  const { state, onUpdateProject, onOpenSession, isMobile, onMobileClose } = params
    53→  const {
    54→    setContextMenu,
    55→    editingProject,
    56→    setEditingProject,
    57→    editInputRef,
    58→    editingCategory,
    59→    setEditingCategory,
    60→    categoryEditInputRef,
    61→    addCategory,
    62→    updateCategory,
    63→    categories,
    64→    setIsResizing,
    65→    moveProjectToCategory,
    66→  } = state
    67→
    68→  // Project handlers
    69→  const handleSelectExecutable = useCallback(
    70→    async (project: Project) => {
    71→      const executable = await electronAPI?.selectExecutable?.()
    72→      if (executable) onUpdateProject(project.path, { executable })
    73→      setContextMenu(null)
    74→    },
    75→    [onUpdateProject, setContextMenu]
    76→  )
    77→
    78→  const handleClearExecutable = useCallback(
    79→    (project: Project) => {
    80→      onUpdateProject(project.path, { executable: undefined })
    81→      setContextMenu(null)
    82→    },
    83→    [onUpdateProject, setContextMenu]
    84→  )
    85→
    86→  const handleRunExecutable = useCallback(
    87→    async (project: Project) => {
    88→      if (project.executable) {
    89→        const result = await electronAPI?.runExecutable?.(project.executable, project.path)
    90→        if (result && !result.success) console.error('Failed to run executable:', result.error)
    91→      }
    92→      setContextMenu(null)
    93→    },
    94→    [setContextMenu]
    95→  )
    96→
    97→  // Rename handlers
    98→  // Ref tracks cancel intent so blur handler can skip saving after Escape
    99→  const renameCancelledRef = useRef(false)
   100→
   101→  const handleStartRename = useCallback(
   102→    (e: React.MouseEvent, project: Project) => {
   103→      e.stopPropagation()
   104→      renameCancelledRef.current = false
   105→      setEditingProject({ path: project.path, name: project.name })
   106→      setTimeout(() => editInputRef.current?.select(), 0)
   107→    },
   108→    [setEditingProject, editInputRef]
   109→  )
   110→
   111→  const handleRenameSubmit = useCallback(() => {
   112→    if (renameCancelledRef.current) {
   113→      renameCancelledRef.current = false
   114→      return
   115→    }
   116→    if (editingProject && editingProject.name.trim()) {
   117→      onUpdateProject(editingProject.path, { name: editingProject.name.trim() })
   118→    }
   119→    setEditingProject(null)
   120→  }, [editingProject, onUpdateProject, setEditingProject])
   121→
   122→  const handleRenameKeyDown = useCallback(
   123→    (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {
   124→      if (e.key === 'Enter') handleRenameSubmit()
   125→      else if (e.key === 'Escape') {
   126→        renameCancelledRef.current = true
   127→        setEditingProject(null)
   128→      }
   129→    },
   130→    [handleRenameSubmit, setEditingProject]
   131→  )
   132→
   133→  // Category handlers
   134→  const handleAddCategory = useCallback(() => {
   135→    const newId = addCategory('New Category')
   136→    setEditingCategory({ id: newId, name: 'New Category' })
   137→    setTimeout(() => categoryEditInputRef.current?.select(), 0)
   138→  }, [addCategory, setEditingCategory, categoryEditInputRef])
   139→
   140→  const handleOpenCategoryAsProject = useCallback(
   141→    async (categoryName: string) => {
   142→      const metaPath = await electronAPI?.getCategoryMetaPath?.(categoryName)
   143→      if (metaPath) onOpenSession(metaPath)
   144→    },
   145→    [onOpenSession]
   146→  )
   147→
   148→  const handleOpenAllProjects = useCallback(async () => {
   149→    const metaPath = await electronAPI?.getMetaProjectsPath?.()
   150→    if (metaPath) onOpenSession(metaPath)
   151→  }, [onOpenSession])
   152→
   153→  // Category rename cancel ref (same pattern as project rename)
   154→  const categoryRenameCancelledRef = useRef(false)
   155→
   156→  const handleStartCategoryRename = useCallback(
   157→    (category: ReturnType<typeof useWorkspaceStore.getState>['categories'][0]) => {
   158→      categoryRenameCancelledRef.current = false
   159→      setEditingCategory({ id: category.id, name: category.name })
   160→      setTimeout(() => categoryEditInputRef.current?.select(), 0)
   161→    },
   162→    [setEditingCategory, categoryEditInputRef]
   163→  )
   164→
   165→  const handleCategoryRenameSubmit = useCallback(() => {
   166→    if (categoryRenameCancelledRef.current) {
   167→      categoryRenameCancelledRef.current = false
   168→      return
   169→    }
   170→    if (editingCategory && editingCategory.name.trim()) {
   171→      updateCategory(editingCategory.id, { name: editingCategory.name.trim() })
   172→    }
   173→    setEditingCategory(null)
   174→  }, [editingCategory, updateCategory, setEditingCategory])
   175→
   176→  const handleCategoryRenameKeyDown = useCallback(
   177→    (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {
   178→      if (e.key === 'Enter') handleCategoryRenameSubmit()
   179→      else if (e.key === 'Escape') {
   180→        categoryRenameCancelledRef.current = true
   181→        setEditingCategory(null)
   182→      }
   183→    },
   184→    [handleCategoryRenameSubmit, setEditingCategory]
   185→  )
   186→
   187→  const toggleCategoryCollapse = useCallback(
   188→    (categoryId: string) => {
   189→      const category = categories.find((c) => c.id === categoryId)
   190→      if (category) updateCategory(categoryId, { collapsed: !category.collapsed })
   191→    },
   192→    [categories, updateCategory]
   193→  )
   194→
   195→  // Resize handler
   196→  const handleMouseDown = useCallback(
   197→    (e: React.MouseEvent) => {
   198→      e.preventDefault()
   199→      setIsResizing(true)
   200→    },
   201→    [setIsResizing]
   202→  )
   203→
   204→  // Backdrop handler
   205→  const handleBackdropClick = useCallback(() => {
   206→    if (isMobile && onMobileClose) {
   207→      onMobileClose()
   208→    }
   209→  }, [isMobile, onMobileClose])
   210→
   211→  return {
   212→    handleSelectExecutable,
   213→    handleClearExecutable,
   214→    handleRunExecutable,
   215→    handleStartRename,
   216→    handleRenameSubmit,
   217→    handleRenameKeyDown,
   218→    handleAddCategory,
   219→    handleOpenCategoryAsProject,
   220→    handleOpenAllProjects,
   221→    handleStartCategoryRename,
   222→    handleCategoryRenameSubmit,
   223→    handleCategoryRenameKeyDown,
   224→    toggleCategoryCollapse,
   225→    handleMouseDown,
   226→    handleBackdropClick,
   227→  }
   228→}
   229→
   230→// Helper for creating category with project
   231→export function useCreateCategoryWithProject(
   232→  state: SidebarState
   233→): (projectPath: string) => void {
   234→  const { addCategory, moveProjectToCategory, setContextMenu, setEditingCategory, categoryEditInputRef } = state
   235→
   236→  return useCallback(
   237→    (projectPath: string) => {
   238→      const newId = addCategory('New Category')
   239→      moveProjectToCategory(projectPath, newId)
   240→      setContextMenu(null)

1→import { useState, useCallback, useRef } from 'react'
     2→import { Project } from '../../../stores/workspace.js'
     3→import { DropTarget } from '../types.js'
     4→
     5→interface UseDragAndDropOptions {
     6→  projects: Project[]
     7→  moveProjectToCategory: (projectPath: string, categoryId: string | null) => void
     8→  reorderProjects: (categoryId: string | null, projectPaths: string[]) => void
     9→  reorderCategories: (categoryIds: string[]) => void
    10→  categories: Array<{ id: string; name: string; order: number; collapsed?: boolean }>
    11→}
    12→
    13→interface UseDragAndDropReturn {
    14→  draggedProject: string | null
    15→  draggedCategory: string | null
    16→  dropTarget: DropTarget | null
    17→  handleProjectDragStart: (e: React.DragEvent, projectPath: string) => void
    18→  handleProjectDragEnd: () => void
    19→  handleCategoryDragOver: (e: React.DragEvent, categoryId: string | null) => void
    20→  handleCategoryDrop: (e: React.DragEvent, categoryId: string | null) => void
    21→  handleProjectDragOver: (
    22→    e: React.DragEvent,
    23→    projectPath: string,
    24→    position: 'before' | 'after'
    25→  ) => void
    26→  handleProjectDrop: (
    27→    e: React.DragEvent,
    28→    targetPath: string,
    29→    targetCategoryId: string | undefined
    30→  ) => void
    31→  handleCategoryDragStart: (e: React.DragEvent, categoryId: string) => void
    32→  handleCategoryDragEnd: () => void
    33→  handleCategoryHeaderDragOver: (
    34→    e: React.DragEvent,
    35→    targetCategoryId: string,
    36→    position: 'before' | 'after'
    37→  ) => void
    38→  handleCategoryHeaderDrop: (e: React.DragEvent, targetCategoryId: string) => void
    39→}
    40→
    41→export function useDragAndDrop({
    42→  projects,
    43→  moveProjectToCategory,
    44→  reorderProjects,
    45→  reorderCategories,
    46→  categories,
    47→}: UseDragAndDropOptions): UseDragAndDropReturn {
    48→  const [draggedProject, setDraggedProject] = useState<string | null>(null)
    49→  const [draggedCategory, setDraggedCategory] = useState<string | null>(null)
    50→  const [dropTarget, setDropTarget] = useState<DropTarget | null>(null)
    51→  // Ref tracks the latest dropTarget so drop handlers always read fresh position
    52→  // (state in the closure may be stale if React hasn't re-rendered since the last dragOver)
    53→  const dropTargetRef = useRef<DropTarget | null>(null)
    54→
    55→  const handleProjectDragStart = useCallback((e: React.DragEvent, projectPath: string) => {
    56→    setDraggedProject(projectPath)
    57→    e.dataTransfer.effectAllowed = 'move'
    58→    e.dataTransfer.setData('text/plain', projectPath)
    59→    // Also set custom type so TiledTerminalView can detect sidebar project drags
    60→    e.dataTransfer.setData('application/x-sidebar-project', projectPath)
    61→  }, [])
    62→
    63→  const handleProjectDragEnd = useCallback(() => {
    64→    setDraggedProject(null)
    65→    setDropTarget(null)
    66→    dropTargetRef.current = null
    67→  }, [])
    68→
    69→  const handleCategoryDragOver = useCallback(
    70→    (e: React.DragEvent, categoryId: string | null) => {
    71→      e.preventDefault()
    72→      e.dataTransfer.dropEffect = 'move'
    73→      if (draggedProject) {
    74→        const target: DropTarget = {
    75→          type: categoryId ? 'category' : 'uncategorized',
    76→          id: categoryId,
    77→        }
    78→        setDropTarget(target)
    79→        dropTargetRef.current = target
    80→      }
    81→    },
    82→    [draggedProject]
    83→  )
    84→
    85→  const handleCategoryDrop = useCallback(
    86→    (e: React.DragEvent, categoryId: string | null) => {
    87→      e.preventDefault()
    88→      if (draggedProject) {
    89→        moveProjectToCategory(draggedProject, categoryId)
    90→      }
    91→      setDraggedProject(null)
    92→      setDropTarget(null)
    93→      dropTargetRef.current = null
    94→    },
    95→    [draggedProject, moveProjectToCategory]
    96→  )
    97→
    98→  const handleProjectDragOver = useCallback(
    99→    (e: React.DragEvent, projectPath: string, position: 'before' | 'after') => {
   100→      e.preventDefault()
   101→      e.stopPropagation()
   102→      e.dataTransfer.dropEffect = 'move'
   103→      if (draggedProject && draggedProject !== projectPath) {
   104→        const target: DropTarget = { type: 'project', id: projectPath, position }
   105→        setDropTarget(target)
   106→        dropTargetRef.current = target
   107→      }
   108→    },
   109→    [draggedProject]
   110→  )
   111→
   112→  const handleProjectDrop = useCallback(
   113→    (e: React.DragEvent, targetPath: string, targetCategoryId: string | undefined) => {
   114→      e.preventDefault()
   115→      e.stopPropagation()
   116→
   117→      if (draggedProject && draggedProject !== targetPath) {
   118→        const draggedProjectData = projects.find((p) => p.path === draggedProject)
   119→        const targetProject = projects.find((p) => p.path === targetPath)
   120→
   121→        if (draggedProjectData && targetProject) {
   122→          moveProjectToCategory(draggedProject, targetCategoryId ?? null)
   123→          const categoryProjects = projects
   124→            .filter((p) =>
   125→              targetCategoryId ? p.categoryId === targetCategoryId : !p.categoryId
   126→            )
   127→            .sort((a, b) => (a.order ?? 0) - (b.order ?? 0))
   128→            .map((p) => p.path)
   129→
   130→          const newOrder = categoryProjects.filter((p) => p !== draggedProject)
   131→          const targetIndex = newOrder.indexOf(targetPath)
   132→          // Read from ref to get the latest position (state may be stale)
   133→          const currentDropTarget = dropTargetRef.current
   134→          const insertIndex = currentDropTarget?.position === 'after' ? targetIndex + 1 : targetIndex
   135→          newOrder.splice(insertIndex, 0, draggedProject)
   136→          reorderProjects(targetCategoryId ?? null, newOrder)
   137→        }
   138→      }
   139→      setDraggedProject(null)
   140→      setDropTarget(null)
   141→      dropTargetRef.current = null
   142→    },
   143→    [draggedProject, projects, moveProjectToCategory, reorderProjects]
   144→  )
   145→
   146→  const handleCategoryDragStart = useCallback((e: React.DragEvent, categoryId: string) => {
   147→    setDraggedCategory(categoryId)
   148→    e.dataTransfer.effectAllowed = 'move'
   149→    e.dataTransfer.setData('text/plain', categoryId)
   150→  }, [])
   151→
   152→  const handleCategoryDragEnd = useCallback(() => {
   153→    setDraggedCategory(null)
   154→    setDropTarget(null)
   155→    dropTargetRef.current = null
   156→  }, [])
   157→
   158→  const handleCategoryHeaderDragOver = useCallback(
   159→    (e: React.DragEvent, targetCategoryId: string, position: 'before' | 'after') => {
   160→      e.preventDefault()
   161→      e.dataTransfer.dropEffect = 'move'
   162→      if (draggedCategory && draggedCategory !== targetCategoryId) {
   163→        const target: DropTarget = { type: 'category', id: targetCategoryId, position }
   164→        setDropTarget(target)
   165→        dropTargetRef.current = target
   166→      }
   167→    },
   168→    [draggedCategory]
   169→  )
   170→
   171→  const handleCategoryHeaderDrop = useCallback(
   172→    (e: React.DragEvent, targetCategoryId: string) => {
   173→      e.preventDefault()
   174→      if (draggedCategory && draggedCategory !== targetCategoryId) {
   175→        const orderedCategories = [...categories].sort((a, b) => a.order - b.order)
   176→        const categoryIds = orderedCategories.map((c) => c.id)
   177→        const newOrder = categoryIds.filter((id) => id !== draggedCategory)
   178→        const targetIndex = newOrder.indexOf(targetCategoryId)
   179→        // Read from ref to get the latest position (state may be stale)
   180→        const currentDropTarget = dropTargetRef.current
   181→        const insertIndex = currentDropTarget?.position === 'after' ? targetIndex + 1 : targetIndex
   182→        newOrder.splice(insertIndex, 0, draggedCategory)
   183→        reorderCategories(newOrder)
   184→      }
   185→      setDraggedCategory(null)
   186→      setDropTarget(null)
   187→      dropTargetRef.current = null
   188→    },
   189→    [draggedCategory, categories, reorderCategories]
   190→  )
   191→
   192→  return {
   193→    draggedProject,
   194→    draggedCategory,
   195→    dropTarget,
   196→    handleProjectDragStart,
   197→    handleProjectDragEnd,
   198→    handleCategoryDragOver,
   199→    handleCategoryDrop,
   200→    handleProjectDragOver,
   201→    handleProjectDrop,
   202→    handleCategoryDragStart,
   203→    handleCategoryDragEnd,
   204→    handleCategoryHeaderDragOver,
   205→    handleCategoryHeaderDrop,
   206→  }
   207→}
